response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches 'Supernova' and 'ずうっといっしょ!'. The Reference JSON for the first song ('Supernova') contained the wrong lyrics (duplicated from the second song); I ignored it and transcribed the audio/on-screen cues directly. For the second song ('ずうっといっしょ!'), the JSON had several small errors ('アオハル' instead of '破廉恥', 'drama' instead of 'trauma', and 'よりから' instead of 'ゆびから'), which I corrected based on the audio and on-screen text. Timing is strictly wrapped to the vocal bursts.

subtitles.original: ヴェール
subtitles.english: Veil

subtitles.original: どうしても聞き流して
subtitles.english: No matter what, please ignore it

subtitles.original: その深い深い憂鬱に
subtitles.english: In that deep, deep melancholy...

subtitles.original: 別の色を載せちゃい
subtitles.english: I want to overlay another color.

subtitles.original: おいたしたから振りも今蹴飛ばして
subtitles.english: Because I've kicked away the past...

subtitles.original: 駆けつけるから
subtitles.english: and I'm rushing to you now.

subtitles.original: 甘く見守って見せるから
subtitles.english: Because I'll show you I can watch over you sweetly

subtitles.original: bye-bye してもう
subtitles.english: Even if we say goodbye...

subtitles.original: 元通りにだなんてない
subtitles.english: we'll never go back to the way things were.

subtitles.original: 私に成せることはないが
subtitles.english: There's nothing I can achieve, but...

subtitles.original: でもそうだきっと
subtitles.english: But that's right, surely...

subtitles.original: 祝う空に舞って言って
subtitles.english: dance in the celebratory sky and say it.

subtitles.original: 仰ぐ頷き 広がる空から
subtitles.english: Looking up, nodding, from the spreading sky

subtitles.original: 合図していたい うっかりしなきゃ始まらない
subtitles.english: I want to be signaling, it won't start unless I'm careless

subtitles.original: 歪なステップでも 今は君と踊っていたい
subtitles.english: Even with distorted steps, right now I want to dance with you

subtitles.original: ただ生きるための まじないを そこに残したい
subtitles.english: I want to leave a spell there, just for the sake of living

subtitles.original: 命を追って欲しい 君と
subtitles.english: I want you to chase after life...

subtitles.original: 短く長い季節を歩って
subtitles.english: walking through short and long seasons with you.

subtitles.original: bye-bye してもう 元通りにだなんてない
subtitles.english: Even if we say goodbye, we'll never go back to the way things were

subtitles.original: 私に出来ることはあるか
subtitles.english: Is there anything I can do?

subtitles.original: このテンポ そうだ こんな歌なら どうだ
subtitles.english: This tempo, that's right, if it's a song like this, how about it?

subtitles.original: だらしなくないけど ちょっといいかもね
subtitles.english: It's not slovenly, but it might be a little good

subtitles.original: もっと響かせて
subtitles.english: Make it resonate more

subtitles.original: この道に駆けて
subtitles.english: Running through this path

subtitles.original: ずうっといっしょ!
subtitles.english: Always Together!

subtitles.original: 充電器を貸して！
subtitles.english: Lend me a charger!

subtitles.original: またあなたのせいであたしすり減った
subtitles.english: Again, because of you, I'm worn out

subtitles.original: 終電見逃してまたあたしのせいで帰れなくなった
subtitles.english: Missed the last train, again because of me I can't go home

subtitles.original: 繋がっていようね、消耗戦に持ち込んで
subtitles.english: Let's stay connected, bring it to a war of attrition

subtitles.original: 破廉恥な思い出で
subtitles.english: In the shameful memories...

subtitles.original: ずうっといっしょ！
subtitles.english: let's stay together forever!

subtitles.original: 参観日にだって誰からも見られていない気がしたんだ
subtitles.english: Even on visiting day, I felt like no one was watching me

subtitles.original: 散々シニカって昼の街に期待しないようにしたんだ
subtitles.english: I became cynical and stopped expecting anything from the city by day

subtitles.original: そうやって守った孤独さえ めちゃくちゃになった
subtitles.english: Even the loneliness I protected like that became a mess

subtitles.original: あたしいつだって 死にたくて仕方ない
subtitles.english: I've always been desperate to die

subtitles.original: こんな顔 だいじにしたいと思えないもん
subtitles.english: I can't even think of holding this face dear

subtitles.original: ともに過ごした日々が
subtitles.english: The days we spent together...

subtitles.original: ささやかな幸せが
subtitles.english: the modest happiness...

subtitles.original: かけがえのないトラウマになってたらいいな
subtitles.english: if only they could become an irreplaceable trauma.

subtitles.original: あんなレパートリーなんて 誰かが付け足す 束の間だよね
subtitles.english: That kind of repertory is just a fleeting moment someone adds, right?

subtitles.original: あなたの一生の後悔として添い遂げるよ
subtitles.english: I'll be with you as your lifelong regret

subtitles.original: 大切なものってなに？ 今失くしたそれ
subtitles.english: What's the most important thing? The one you just lost

subtitles.original: 私と間違いを犯したんな 取り返しがつかないです
subtitles.english: I've made a mistake with you, it's irreversible

subtitles.original: 声が枯れる時も 止める時も
subtitles.english: When my voice withers, when I stop it...

subtitles.original: 狂い咲きの中でずうっといっしょ
subtitles.english: in the midst of blooming madness, let's stay together.

subtitles.original: もうちょっと普通に 悲しいこと 悲しいと思いたかった
subtitles.english: I wanted to think of sad things as sad, a little more normally

subtitles.original: 絶頂の最中に 感情一掃して 楽になりたかった
subtitles.english: In the midst of the climax, I wanted to clear my emotions and be at ease

subtitles.original: 先生 一生懸命に 生きてくださいね
subtitles.english: Teacher, please live with all your might

subtitles.original: あたしいつだって 死にたくて仕方ない
subtitles.english: I've always been desperate to die

subtitles.original: あんな奴の言いなりになんていたくないの
subtitles.english: I don't want to be at the mercy of someone like that

subtitles.original: あなただけ一人で 私の目を盗んで
subtitles.english: Don't think of becoming happy by stealing my eyes...

subtitles.original: 幸せになろうなんて思わないで
subtitles.english: all by yourself.

subtitles.original: 髪を乾かしてくれる指から
subtitles.english: From the fingers that dry my hair...

subtitles.original: 私は壊されたんだよ
subtitles.english: I was destroyed.

subtitles.original: あなたの一生の後悔として添い遂げるよ
subtitles.english: I'll be with you as your lifelong regret

subtitles.original: 外れなくなってしまった指輪みたいに
subtitles.english: Like a ring that has become impossible to remove

subtitles.original: ずっと欲しがっている 最低だよ
subtitles.english: Always wanting it, it's the worst

subtitles.original: 一緒にいた時の方が 私可愛かったな
subtitles.english: When we were together, I was cuter

subtitles.original: あなたの一生の後悔として添い遂げるよ
subtitles.english: I'll be with you as your lifelong regret

subtitles.original: 大切なものってなに？ 胸失くしたそれ
subtitles.english: What's the most important thing? The one I lost in my heart

subtitles.original: 私と間違いを犯したんな 取り返しがつかないです
subtitles.english: I've made a mistake with you, it's irreversible

subtitles.original: 声が枯れる時も 止める時も
subtitles.english: When my voice withers, when I stop it...

subtitles.original: 誰かと眠っていても
subtitles.english: even if you're sleeping with someone else...

subtitles.original: 朝が来るまでずうっといっしょ
subtitles.english: let's stay together forever until morning comes.
